scope: N-19 PCI lab-share total cost estimate (one-shot pilot, n=1 user + ~5 calibration volunteers)
honest_c3: All numbers are PUBLIC-INFERRED from analog Korean university lab rates and IRB filing fees. No facility was quoted directly. Real cost may vary ±50%.

irb_filing_via_korean_co_pi.korea_u_irb_filing_fee_krw: 0–500,000 KRW (often waived for student-led non-clinical research)

scenario_a_full_lab_share_path.user_time_cost_no_dollar: ~30–40 hours (4 sessions × 90min + IRB prep 10h + transport 10h + calibration cohort recruitment 10h)

scenario_b_clinical_treatment_off_label_.description: Pay private TMS clinic (e.g., Seoul Psychiatry Gangnam) as treatment patient, ask permission to record OpenBCI in parallel during their session. Higher per-session cost, no IRB needed (BUT no peer-review publishability and ethics issues with using treatment as research surrogate).
scenario_b_clinical_treatment_off_label_.blockers: Most private rTMS clinics use repetitive (10Hz/intermittent theta-burst) protocols, NOT single-pulse Massimini-style. Clinical TMS is therapeutic, not measurement-grade. PCI requires specific single-pulse jittered ISI ≥ 1500ms = NOT a clinical protocol. Clinic likely refuses request.
scenario_b_clinical_treatment_off_label_.honest_c3: Scenario B does not yield Massimini-protocol PCI data. Documented as fallback IF lab-share path fully blocked AND user accepts research-grade-only single-pulse rig at home (separate path).

scenario_c_capex_used_magstim_purchase.blocker: $17K capex >> $1.6–2.5K target. NOT recommended for one-shot pilot.

recommendation.primary: Scenario A → TOP-1 = Korea University Affective Cognitive Neuroscience Lab (F4)
fallback_chain: F4 Korea U declines or unavailable → F2 KAIST Brain x Machine Intelligence Lab (Sang Wan Lee) — strongest TMS+EEG+computational fit, but Daejeon transport + KAIST IRB longer
F2 declines → F1 KAIST BINP (Seungwoo Lee) — neural prosthetics focus, less PCI overlap but TMS available
F1 declines → F3 Yonsei Severance Neurology — clinical-grade route, slowest but highest signal quality
All declined → Scenario B (private clinic + parallel BYOE) WITH HONEST C3 disclosure that single-pulse Massimini protocol cannot be obtained from clinical rTMS treatment session
